data.description:
Tighten the verifier IMPACT prompt for consistency (robustness, not a blocker). The
severity attributes get zero anchoring in `plan_review_verifier.md` (vs rich validity
guidance), so add per-attribute definitions, level anchors, and plan-aware framing to
curb per-ticket inflation. Guarded by the `discriminates_impact_levels` eval already
landed + the distribution report.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each severity attribute has a definition + level anchors in `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/plan_review_verifier.md` (+ `_agentic`)
- [ ] Plan-stage framing for reversibility/blast_radius
- [ ] `discriminates_impact_levels` eval still passes; `scripts/plan_review_impact_distribution.py` shows no regression to saturation
data.title: Remediation-mode gate: freshness window + preconditions + wiring
